response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "ParseCommand",
      "purpose": "Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation to execute",
      "behavior": "Check command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'; return parsed command type",
      "inputs": ["command: str"],
      "outputs": ["command_type: str"],
      "signature": "def ParseCommand(command: str) -> str",
      "global_vars": [],
      "data_operations": [],
      "requested_capabilities": [],
      "constraints": [
        {"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "command must be one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'"}
      ],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "Returns 'place' for input 'place'"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-002", "description": "Returns 'cancel' for input 'cancel'"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-003", "description": "Returns 'track' for input 'track'"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-004", "description": "Raises ValueError for invalid command"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": true,
      "stop_reason": "Simple validation logic, no further decomposition needed"
    },
    {
      "name": "ValidateOrderData",
      "purpose": "Validate order_data structure and required fields based on command type",
      "behavior": "Check required fields exist and have correct types; for 'place' ensure items list non-empty; for 'cancel' and 'track' ensure order_id present",
      "inputs": ["command_type: str", "order_data: dict"],
      "outputs": ["validated_data: dict"],
      "signature": "def ValidateOrderData(command_type: str, order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [],
      "data_operations": [],
      "requested_capabilities": [],
      "constraints": [
        {"constraint_id": "C-002", "description": "order_data must be a dict"},
        {"constraint_id": "C-003", "description": "For 'place', order_data must contain 'items' as non-empty list"},
        {"constraint_id": "C-004", "description": "For 'cancel' and 'track', order_data must contain 'order_id' as string"}
      ],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-005", "description": "Returns validated_data dict for valid input"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-006", "description": "Raises ValueError for missing required fields"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-007", "description": "Raises ValueError for empty items list in 'place'"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": true,
      "stop_reason": "Simple validation logic, no further decomposition needed"
    },
    {
      "name": "PlaceOrder",
      "purpose": "Execute the 'place' order workflow: validate inventory, charge payment, reserve stock, create order, send notification",
      "behavior": "Check item availability and stock, charge payment via payment gateway, reserve inventory, create order record, send confirmation notification; rollback on failure",
      "inputs": ["validated_data: dict", "orders: Database", "inventory: Database"],
      "outputs": ["order_result: dict"],
      "signature": "def PlaceOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read_write", "description": "Order database for creating and updating order records"},
        {"variable": "inventory", "op": "read_write", "description": "Inventory database for checking and reserving stock"},
        {"variable": "payments", "op": "read_write", "description": "Payment records for charging and tracking payments"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "orders", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Create new order record, update status"},
        {"source_name": "inventory", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Read stock levels, decrement reserved count"},
        {"source_name": "payments", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Create payment record, update status"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["database.read_write", "payment.charge"],
      "constraints": [
        {"constraint_id": "C-005", "description": "Must check inventory availability before charging payment"},
        {"constraint_id": "C-006", "description": "Must charge payment before reserving inventory"},
        {"constraint_id": "C-007", "description": "Must rollback all changes on any failure"}
      ],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-008", "description": "Creates order record in orders database"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-009", "description": "Charges payment and creates payment record"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-010", "description": "Reserves inventory by decrementing stock count"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-011", "description": "Returns success result with order_id on success"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-012", "description": "Rolls back all changes on failure and returns error"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001", "FR-002"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "Complex workflow requiring multiple data store interactions"
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrder",
      "purpose": "Execute the 'cancel' order workflow: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status",
      "behavior": "Lookup order, check status not shipped, refund payment, restore reserved inventory, update order status to cancelled; rollback on failure",
      "inputs": ["validated_data: dict", "orders: Database", "inventory: Database"],
      "outputs": ["order_result: dict"],
      "signature": "def CancelOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read_write", "description": "Order database for reading and updating order status"},
        {"variable": "inventory", "op": "read_write", "description": "Inventory database for restoring reserved stock"},
        {"variable": "payments", "op": "read_write", "description": "Payment records for refund processing"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "orders", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Read order details, update status to cancelled"},
        {"source_name": "inventory", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Restore reserved stock count"},
        {"source_name": "payments", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Process refund, update payment status"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["database.read_write", "payment.refund"],
      "constraints": [
        {"constraint_id": "C-008", "description": "Must verify order exists and is not shipped before cancelling"},
        {"constraint_id": "C-009", "description": "Must refund payment before restoring inventory"},
        {"constraint_id": "C-010", "description": "Must rollback all changes on any failure"}
      ],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-013", "description": "Updates order status to cancelled in orders database"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-014", "description": "Refunds payment and updates payment record"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-015", "description": "Restores inventory by incrementing stock count"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-016", "description": "Returns success result on success"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-017", "description": "Returns error if order is already shipped"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-018", "description": "Rolls back all changes on failure"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001", "FR-003"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": "Complex workflow requiring multiple data store interactions"
    },
    {
      "name": "TrackOrder",
      "purpose": "Execute the 'track' order workflow: return current order status and estimated delivery time",
      "behavior": "Lookup order by order_id, retrieve status and estimated delivery, return result",
      "inputs": ["validated_data: dict", "orders: Database"],
      "outputs": ["order_result: dict"],
      "signature": "def TrackOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read", "description": "Order database for reading order status and delivery info"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "orders", "operation_type": "read", "description": "Read order record to get status and estimated delivery"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["database.read"],
      "constraints": [
        {"constraint_id": "C-011", "description": "Must not modify any data stores"}
      ],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-019", "description": "Returns order status and estimated delivery time for valid order_id"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-020", "description": "Returns error if order_id not found"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001", "FR-004"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": true,
      "stop_reason": "Simple read-only query, no further decomposition needed"
    },
    {
      "name": "FormatResult",
      "purpose": "Format the operation result into the standard output JSON structure",
      "behavior": "Take success, order_id, status, message from child operation and construct final output dict",
      "inputs": ["operation_result: dict"],
      "outputs": ["order_result: dict"],
      "signature": "def FormatResult(operation_result: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [],
      "data_operations": [],
      "requested_capabilities": [],
      "constraints": [
        {"constraint_id": "C-012", "description": "Output must contain 'success', 'order_id', 'status', 'message' keys"}
      ],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-021", "description": "Returns dict with 'success', 'order_id', 'status', 'message' keys"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-022", "description": "Preserves all fields from input operation_result"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": true,
      "stop_reason": "Simple formatting logic, no further decomposition needed"
    }
  ],
  "governance_notes": "Global variables are scoped per child as subsets of parent globals. PlaceOrder and CancelOrder require read_write access to orders, inventory, and payments databases. TrackOrder requires only read access to orders. ParseCommand, ValidateOrderData, and FormatResult are pure functions with no data store access. Each child's global_vars is a strict subset of the parent's global_vars."
}
